audit_items.proof_trace: All arithmetic is bounded: (1) L653 enforces endingPriceMultiplier ≤ startingPriceMultiplier at config time, so the uint64 subtraction cannot underflow; (2) elapsedTime is capped to auctionDuration at L785, so mulDiv result ≤ (start − end) ≤ startingPriceMultiplier, preventing the outer subtraction from underflowing; (3) Solady FixedPointMathLib.mulDiv uses 512-bit internal multiplication, so the intermediate (2^64 × 2^24 = 2^88) product cannot overflow uint256.
